input.background: Determine the sample size required for conducting a two-sided test of H0: p1=p2 with an equal number of subjects in each group, α=0.05 (z1-(.05 / 2)=1.96), 1-β=0.90 (z.90=1.282), p1=0.10, and p2=0.05.
input.question: How many individuals should be studied if we want to incorporate a continuity correction into our test statistic?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量
output.answer: n′ = (581.26 / 4)(1 + √(1 + 4 / (581.26 |0.10-0.05|)))^2 = 620.6. Therefore, resolve to study 621 observations per group.

alpha.description: Significance level for the hypothesis test.

z_alpha_half.description: Z-score corresponding to the significance level alpha divided by 2.

power.description: The power of the test, representing the probability of correctly rejecting the null hypothesis.

z_power.description: Z-score corresponding to the power of the test.
